title: solanum acaule subsp. punae
intro: Solanum acaule subsp. punae is a sub-species of the Solanum acaule plant, commonly known as the "dwarf potato" or "punae potato." It is a type of wild potato native to the mountains of Central Chile, and is valued for its medicinal and edible properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Solanum acaule subsp. punae can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
